title: [HW] Add port dir flip function, make `PortDirection` an enum class; NFC
body: Add a `flip(PortDirection)` function which reverses a port direction. Also turn `PortDirection` into an `enum class` to avoid polluting the HW namespace. Most uses of the enum already have a `PortDirection::` prefix, so the change is fairly minimal and just enforces and already established practice.
